  <link data-external="1" rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.10.3/font/bootstrap-icons.css">
</head>
  <style>
code{white-space: pre-wrap;}
span.smallcaps{font-variant: small-caps;}
div.columns{display: flex; gap: min(4vw, 1.5em);}
div.column{flex: auto; overflow-x: auto;}
div.hanging-indent{margin-left: 1.5em; text-indent: -1.5em;}

ul.task-list[class]{list-style: none;}
ul.task-list li input[type="checkbox"] {
font-size: inherit;
width: 0.8em;
margin: 0 0.8em 0.2em -1.6em;
vertical-align: middle;
}
.display.math{display: block; text-align: center; margin: 0.5rem auto;}

div.csl-bib-body { }
div.csl-entry {
clear: both;
margin-bottom: 0em;
}
.hanging-indent div.csl-entry {
margin-left:2em;
text-indent:-2em;
}
div.csl-left-margin {
min-width:2em;
float:left;
}
div.csl-right-inline {
margin-left:2em;
padding-left:1em;
}
div.csl-indent {
margin-left: 2em;
} </style>
  <style type="text/css">
#toc-sidebar ::marker
{ content: none; }

body {
font-family: sans-serif;
}

#toc-sidebar a span
{
display: none;
}
#toc-sidebar a span.toc-section-number
{
display: inline;
}

#toc-sidebar
{
padding-top: 2em;
}

#toc-sidebar > ul {
padding: 0;
}

#toc-sidebar ul ul ul
{
display: none;
}

#toc-sidebar a
{
text-decoration: none;
font-size: 0.875em;
}
.selflink {
text-decoration: none;
}
.selflink::after {
content: ' 🔗';
font-size: 14pt;
vertical-align: middle;
opacity: 0.5;
}
h1:hover > .selflink::after,
h2:hover > .selflink::after,
h3:hover > .selflink::after,
h4:hover > .selflink::after,
h5:hover > .selflink::after,
h6:hover > .selflink::after {
opacity: 1;
}
.suggestedit {
text-decoration: none;
}
.suggestedit::after {
content: ' ✎';
font-size: 14pt;
vertical-align: middle;
opacity: 0.5;
}
h1:hover > .suggestedit::after,
h2:hover > .suggestedit::after,
h3:hover > .suggestedit::after,
h4:hover > .suggestedit::after,
h5:hover > .suggestedit::after,
h6:hover > .suggestedit::after {
opacity: 1;
}


body {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
height: 100vh;
}
#all-below-top-bar {
height: calc(100vh - 56px);
}

:root {

--sidenote-width: calc(min(23%, 376px));
--sidenote-col-width: calc(min(25%, 400px));
}
.sidenote, .todo, .missingcontent {
float: right;
clear: right;
margin-bottom: 1em;
width: var(--sidenote-width);

margin-right: calc(0px - var(--sidenote-col-width));
font-size: 80%;
}
.todo, .missingcontent {
color: gray;
font-style: italic;
}
.todo::before {
font-weight: bold;
color: navy;
content: "Todo ";
}
.missingcontent::before {
font-weight: bold;
color: navy;
content: "Missing content ";
}
.todo_ref, .missingcontent_ref {
display: none;
}

@media (max-width: 767px) {
:root {

--toc-sidebar-max-width: 100%;
--main-content-max-width: calc(min(100%, 576px));

--sidenote-col-width: 0px;
}

.sidenote, .todo, .missingcontent {
display: none;
float: none;
margin: 5% 10% 5% 10%;
width: 80%;
font-size: 80%;
}
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
:root {

--toc-sidebar-max-width: 100%;
--main-content-max-width: calc(min(100%, 576px));
}
}

@media (min-width: 1200px) {
:root {

--toc-sidebar-max-width: calc(min(25%, 576px));

--main-content-max-width: calc(min(75%, 576px));
}
#main-content-col:not(.without-tocsidebar) {
max-width: calc(100% - var(--toc-sidebar-max-width));
}
#main-content-col .without-tocsidebar {
max-width: 100%;
}
}
#toc-sidebar {
max-width: var(--toc-sidebar-max-width);
}
#main-content-max-width {
max-width: var(--main-content-max-width);
}
#main-content-with-sidenotes {
width: calc(var(--main-content-max-width) + var(--sidenote-col-width));
}
.sidenote_ref {
cursor: pointer;
}
figure {
display: block;
}
figure img {
margin: 0px auto;
display: block;
}
figure img + figcaption {
margin: 0px auto;
display: block;
text-align: center;
}
.definition {
border-left: 4px solid #5B8FF9;
padding: 0.5em 1em;
margin: 1em 0;
background-color: #f7faff;
}
.definition > .caption {
display: block;
font-weight: bold;
font-size: 1.1em;
margin-bottom: 0.4em;
}
.example {
border-left: 4px solid #f7db5e;
padding: 0.5em 1em;
margin: 1em 0;
background-color: #f7faff;
}
.example > .caption {
font-style: italic;
}

.index-entry-list {
background-color:rgb(239, 239, 239);
column-count: 2;
column-gap: 1.5rem;
}
.index-entry {
display: block;
}
.index-entry-indentation {
display: inline-block;
width: 1em;
}
.index-entry-locator {
margin-left: auto;
}
.index-entry-locator a {
text-decoration: none;
color: #5B8FF9;
}
blockquote{

width:90%;
margin:20px auto;
font-family:Open Sans;
font-style:italic;
color: #555555;
padding: 3.2em 20px 1.2em 25px;
border-left:8px solid #78C0A8 ;

position: relative;
background:#EDEDED;
}
blockquote::before{
font-family:Arial;
content: "\201C";
color:#78C0A8;
font-size:4em;
position: absolute;
left: 10px;
top:-10px;
}
blockquote::after{
content: '';
}
.smaller {
font-size: 80%;
}
.feedback-button {
font-size: 10pt;
}
.csl-entry {
background-color:rgb(239, 239, 239);
padding: 0.5em 1em;
margin: 1em 0;
}

div.toc-list {

margin-left: 40px;

}</style>

    </ul></li>

    </ul>

  <div id="main-content-with-sidenotes" class="h-100">

  <div id="main-content-max-width" class="h-100">
<header id="title-block-header">
  <h1 class="title">pandoc_writing_tools Feature Demo</h1>
        <p>
    </p>
  <p>Last updated: <DATE></p>
  <p>Version: <VER></p>
</header>

<main id="content">
<!--
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: <text>Copyright 2026 Arm Limited and/or its affiliates <open-source-office@arm.com></text>
SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
-->
<h1 data-number="1" data-section-number="1" id="sec:overview"><span class="header-section-number">1</span> Overview<a href="#sec:overview" class="selflink"></a><span class="feedback-button"> <a href="mailto:docs@example.com?subject=%5BFeedback%5D%20pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%20v<VER>%20-%20Section%3A%20Overview&amp;body=Hi%2C%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20have%20some%20feedback%20regarding%20the%20section%20%27Overview%27%20in%20%27pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%27%20v<VER>.%0D%0A%0D%0A">[give
feedback]</a></span><a href="https://github.com/kbeyls/pandoc_writing_tools/edit/main/examples/feature-demo/src/feature-demo.md#L15" class="suggestedit" title="Suggest an edit"></a></h1>
<p>This document demonstrates the functionality of the Lua filters in
pandoc_writing_tools.</p>
<h2 data-number="1.1" data-section-number="1.1" id="sec:citations-and-refs"><span class="header-section-number">1.1</span> Citations and section
references<a href="#sec:citations-and-refs" class="selflink"></a><span class="feedback-button"> <a href="mailto:docs@example.com?subject=%5BFeedback%5D%20pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%20v<VER>%20-%20Section%3A%20Citations%20and%20section%20references&amp;body=Hi%2C%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20have%20some%20feedback%20regarding%20the%20section%20%27Citations%20and%20section%20references%27%20in%20%27pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%27%20v<VER>.%0D%0A%0D%0A">[give
feedback]</a></span><a href="https://github.com/kbeyls/pandoc_writing_tools/edit/main/examples/feature-demo/src/feature-demo.md#L20" class="suggestedit" title="Suggest an edit"></a></h2>
<p>This is what a citation looks like: <span class="citation" data-cites="doe2020">(Doe 2020)</span>. The list of all cited references
appears in the bibliography section at the end of the document.</p>
<p>The pandoc_writing_tools lua filters enable referring to a section by
number, for example, this references section <a href="#sec:overview">1</a>.</p>
<h2 data-number="1.2" data-section-number="1.2" id="table-of-contents"><span class="header-section-number">1.2</span>
Table of contents<a href="#table-of-contents" class="selflink"></a><span class="feedback-button"> <a href="mailto:docs@example.com?subject=%5BFeedback%5D%20pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%20v<VER>%20-%20Section%3A%20Table%20of%20contents&amp;body=Hi%2C%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20have%20some%20feedback%20regarding%20the%20section%20%27Table%20of%20contents%27%20in%20%27pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%27%20v<VER>.%0D%0A%0D%0A">[give
feedback]</a></span><a href="https://github.com/kbeyls/pandoc_writing_tools/edit/main/examples/feature-demo/src/feature-demo.md#L28" class="suggestedit" title="Suggest an edit"></a></h2>
<p>The table of contents is generated from the section headers. The
<code>toc-list-top-level</code> and <code>toc-list-entry-levels</code>
attributes control which headers are included and how they are nested.
For example, the mini-TOC below includes level 2 and level 3 headers
under the “Overview” section:</p>
<div class="toc-list">
<a href="#sec:citations-and-refs">1.1 Citations and section references
[give feedback]</a><br />

<a href="#table-of-contents">1.2 Table of contents [give
feedback]</a><br />

<a href="#sec:figures">1.3 Figures and references [give
feedback]</a><br />

<a href="#sec:examples">1.4 Examples and definitions [give
feedback]</a><br />

<a href="#sec:index-entries">1.5 Index entries [give feedback]</a><br />

<a href="#sec:sidenotes">1.6 Sidenotes [give feedback]</a><br />

<a href="#sec:todos">1.7 TODOs [give feedback]</a><br />

<a href="#sec:github-links">1.8 Linking to github issues and edit links
[give feedback]</a><br />

</div>
<h2 data-number="1.3" data-section-number="1.3" id="sec:figures"><span class="header-section-number">1.3</span> Figures and references<a href="#sec:figures" class="selflink"></a><span class="feedback-button">
<a href="mailto:docs@example.com?subject=%5BFeedback%5D%20pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%20v<VER>%20-%20Section%3A%20Figures%20and%20references&amp;body=Hi%2C%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20have%20some%20feedback%20regarding%20the%20section%20%27Figures%20and%20references%27%20in%20%27pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%27%20v<VER>.%0D%0A%0D%0A">[give
feedback]</a></span><a href="https://github.com/kbeyls/pandoc_writing_tools/edit/main/examples/feature-demo/src/feature-demo.md#L38" class="suggestedit" title="Suggest an edit"></a></h2>
<figure id="fig:demo" data-count="1">
<img role="img" aria-label="A demo figure" src="data:image/<BASE64>" alt="A demo figure" />
<figcaption>Figure 1: A demo figure</figcaption>
</figure>
<p>See Figure <a href="#fig:demo">1</a> for the numbered figure
reference.</p>
<h2 data-number="1.4" data-section-number="1.4" id="sec:examples"><span class="header-section-number">1.4</span> Examples and definitions<a href="#sec:examples" class="selflink"></a><span class="feedback-button">
<a href="mailto:docs@example.com?subject=%5BFeedback%5D%20pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%20v<VER>%20-%20Section%3A%20Examples%20and%20definitions&amp;body=Hi%2C%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20have%20some%20feedback%20regarding%20the%20section%20%27Examples%20and%20definitions%27%20in%20%27pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%27%20v<VER>.%0D%0A%0D%0A">[give
feedback]</a></span><a href="https://github.com/kbeyls/pandoc_writing_tools/edit/main/examples/feature-demo/src/feature-demo.md#L44" class="suggestedit" title="Suggest an edit"></a></h2>
<p>We have custom environments for examples and definitions, which are
numbered and can be referenced from the text:</p>
<div id="ex:demo" class="example" data-caption="Example 1: Demo example" data-count="1">
<span class="caption">Example 1: Demo example</span>
<p>This block is tagged as an example.</p>
</div>
<div id="def:demo" class="definition" data-caption="Definition 1: Demo definition" data-count="1">
<span class="caption">Definition 1: Demo definition</span>
<p>This block is tagged as a definition.</p>
</div>
<p>Refer back to Example <a href="#ex:demo">1</a> and Definition <a href="#def:demo">1</a>.</p>
<h2 data-number="1.5" data-section-number="1.5" id="sec:index-entries"><span class="header-section-number">1.5</span>
Index entries<a href="#sec:index-entries" class="selflink"></a><span class="feedback-button"> <a href="mailto:docs@example.com?subject=%5BFeedback%5D%20pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%20v<VER>%20-%20Section%3A%20Index%20entries&amp;body=Hi%2C%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20have%20some%20feedback%20regarding%20the%20section%20%27Index%20entries%27%20in%20%27pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%27%20v<VER>.%0D%0A%0D%0A">[give
feedback]</a></span><a href="https://github.com/kbeyls/pandoc_writing_tools/edit/main/examples/feature-demo/src/feature-demo.md#L59" class="suggestedit" title="Suggest an edit"></a></h2>
<p>The index filter allows you to mark index entries in the text, which
are then collected and emitted in an index div, see at the end of this
document. The simplest usage is to just add <code>.index</code> spans
around the relevant text and add an index div somewhere in the document.
The filter will collect all <code>.index</code> spans and emit them as
entries in the index div. You can also specify an <code>entry</code>
attribute on the span to customize the index entry text, and use
<code>!</code> to create nested entries.</p>
<p>For example, in this sentence the word <span id="__index_entry_1" class="index">color</span> is indexed, and a we index the word “<span id="__index_entry_2" class="index" data-entry="idea">concept</span>” as
“idea”. We can also create nested entries like <span id="__index_entry_3" class="index">color!blue</span>, and multiple
entries like <span id="__index_entry_4" class="index">alpha;beta</span>.</p>
<h2 data-number="1.6" data-section-number="1.6" id="sec:sidenotes"><span class="header-section-number">1.6</span> Sidenotes<a href="#sec:sidenotes" class="selflink"></a><span class="feedback-button"> <a href="mailto:docs@example.com?subject=%5BFeedback%5D%20pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%20v<VER>%20-%20Section%3A%20Sidenotes&amp;body=Hi%2C%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20have%20some%20feedback%20regarding%20the%20section%20%27Sidenotes%27%20in%20%27pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%27%20v<VER>.%0D%0A%0D%0A">[give
feedback]</a></span><a href="https://github.com/kbeyls/pandoc_writing_tools/edit/main/examples/feature-demo/src/feature-demo.md#L74" class="suggestedit" title="Suggest an edit"></a></h2>
<p>This sentence has a footnote.<span class="sidenote_ref" href="#sidenote_1"><sup>1</sup></span><span id="sidenote_1" class="sidenote">1. Footnote content that becomes a sidenote in
HTML.</span></p>
<h2 data-number="1.7" data-section-number="1.7" id="sec:todos"><span class="header-section-number">1.7</span> TODOs<a href="#sec:todos" class="selflink"></a><span class="feedback-button"> <a href="mailto:docs@example.com?subject=%5BFeedback%5D%20pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%20v<VER>%20-%20Section%3A%20TODOs&amp;body=Hi%2C%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20have%20some%20feedback%20regarding%20the%20section%20%27TODOs%27%20in%20%27pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%27%20v<VER>.%0D%0A%0D%0A">[give
feedback]</a></span><a href="https://github.com/kbeyls/pandoc_writing_tools/edit/main/examples/feature-demo/src/feature-demo.md#L80" class="suggestedit" title="Suggest an edit"></a></h2>
<p>It is often useful to be able to mark TODO items in the text. It
helps you to avoid writer’s block on something you can’t quite put into
words just yet. The <code>markup_todo.lua</code> filter allows you to do
this with a <code>.todo</code> class. You can use this class on inline
spans for inline TODOs, or on divs for block TODOs. For example, please
<span class="todo_ref" href="#todo_1"><sup>todo</sup></span><span id="todo_1" class="todo">fix this</span> inline.</p>
<span class="todo_ref" href="#todo_2"><sup>todo</sup></span>
<span id="todo_2" class="todo">Block TODO content.</span>
<h2 data-number="1.8" data-section-number="1.8" id="sec:github-links"><span class="header-section-number">1.8</span>
Linking to github issues and edit links<a href="#sec:github-links" class="selflink"></a><span class="feedback-button"> <a href="mailto:docs@example.com?subject=%5BFeedback%5D%20pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%20v<VER>%20-%20Section%3A%20Linking%20to%20github%20issues%20and%20edit%20links&amp;body=Hi%2C%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20have%20some%20feedback%20regarding%20the%20section%20%27Linking%20to%20github%20issues%20and%20edit%20links%27%20in%20%27pandoc_writing_tools%20Feature%20Demo%27%20v<VER>.%0D%0A%0D%0A">[give
feedback]</a></span><a href="https://github.com/kbeyls/pandoc_writing_tools/edit/main/examples/feature-demo/src/feature-demo.md#L92" class="suggestedit" title="Suggest an edit"></a></h2>
<p>Github issue link when enabled: Github issue <a href="https://github.com/kbeyls/pandoc_writing_tools/issues/1"><img role="img" aria-label="#1" src="data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8;base64," alt="#1" /></a>.</p>
<p>Edit links appear as little pencil icons at the end of headers when
<code>add_edit_to_headers.lua</code> is enabled.</p>
<h1 class="unnumbered" id="index-header">Index</h1>
<div class="index-entry-list">
<span class="index-entry"><span class="index-entry-text">alpha</span>
<span class="index-entry-locator"> <a href="#__index_entry_4">1.5</a></span></span>
<p></p>
<span class="index-entry"><span class="index-entry-text">beta</span>
<span class="index-entry-locator"> <a href="#__index_entry_4">1.5</a></span></span>
<p></p>
<span class="index-entry"><span class="index-entry-text">color</span>
<span class="index-entry-locator"> <a href="#__index_entry_1">1.5</a></span></span>
<span class="index-entry"><span class="index-entry-indentation"></span><span class="index-entry-text">blue</span> <span class="index-entry-locator">
<a href="#__index_entry_3">1.5</a></span></span>
<p></p>
<span class="index-entry"><span class="index-entry-text">idea</span>
<span class="index-entry-locator"> <a href="#__index_entry_2">1.5</a></span></span>
</div>
<div id="refs" class="references csl-bib-body hanging-indent" data-entry-spacing="0" role="list">
<div id="ref-doe2020" class="csl-entry" role="listitem">
Doe, Jane. 2020. <span>“Demo Reference.”</span> <em>Demo Journal</em>.
</div>
</div>
</main>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<script data-external="1" src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.6.3.min.js" integrity="sha256-pvPw+upLPUjgMXY0G+8O0xUf+/Im1MZjXxxgOcBQBXU=" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
<script data-external="1" src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.2.3/dist/js/bootstrap.bundle.min.js" integrity="sha384-kenU1KFdBIe4zVF0s0G1M5b4hcpxyD9F7jL+jjXkk+Q2h455rYXK/7HAuoJl+0I4" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
<script data-external="1" src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@popperjs/core@2.11.6/dist/umd/popper.min.js"></script>

<script>
  function isXL() {
    var width = jQuery(window).width();
    return width>=1200;
  }

  // Make sure that on reload, the scroll position of the main content
  // is restored to the current position. The next few lines store the
  // current scroll position before the page is unloaded.
  // The actual restoring happens in the document.ready function.
  jQuery(window).on('beforeunload', function () {
    sessionStorage.setItem('mainScrollTop',
                           jQuery('#main-content-col').scrollTop());
  });

  jQuery(document).ready(function() {
    let toc_sidebar = jQuery('#toc-sidebar');
    let main_content_col = jQuery('#main-content-col');

    // Restore scroll position of the main content column.
    var savedScroll = sessionStorage.getItem('mainScrollTop');
    if (savedScroll !== null) {
      main_content_col.scrollTop(parseInt(savedScroll, 10));
    }

    function setTocVisibility(visible) {
      if (visible) {
        toc_sidebar.removeClass("d-none");
        main_content_col.removeClass("without-tocsidebar");
        if (!isXL()) {
          // on a small screen, make the main content invisible
          // when the TOC is visible.
          main_content_col.addClass("d-none");
        }
      } else {
        toc_sidebar.addClass("d-none");
        // when the TOC is not visible, make the main container span the full
        // width of the screen. This makes sure that the scrollbar appears on
        // the far right hand side.
        main_content_col.removeClass("d-none");
        main_content_col.addClass("without-tocsidebar");
      }
    }

    // Toggle sidebar-toc visibility when the toggle button is clicked.
    jQuery('#toggle-toc-button').click(function() {
      if (toc_sidebar.hasClass("d-xl-block")) {
        // This is the first time the TOC toggler was clicked.
        toc_sidebar.removeClass("d-xl-block");
        // The screensize is smaller than xl -> make the TOC visible.
        // Otherwise, leave the d-none class to make the TOC invisible.
        setTocVisibility(!isXL());
      } else {
        let isVisibleNow = !toc_sidebar.hasClass("d-none");
        setTocVisibility(!isVisibleNow);
      }
    });

    // When the window resizes across the XL boundary, reset TOC
    // visibility to the default, i.e. adding classes d-none and d-xl-block.
    function reset_default_toc_visibility() {
      toc_sidebar.addClass("d-none");
      toc_sidebar.addClass("d-xl-block");
      main_content_col.removeClass("d-none");
      main_content_col.removeClass("without-tocsidebar");
    }

    let previousWindowSizeWasXL = isXL();
    jQuery(window).resize(function() {
      let is_XL = isXL();
      if (is_XL != previousWindowSizeWasXL) {
        previousWindowSizeWasXL = is_XL;
        reset_default_toc_visibility();
      }
    });

    // Also make the TOC sidebar invisible after clicking a link in it
    // when !iXL();
    jQuery('#toc-sidebar a').click(function(){
      if (!isXL()) {
        reset_default_toc_visibility();
      }
    });

    // Make links in the TOC be "secondary links". The result is that
    // they will be coloured grey, so will be less distracting.
    jQuery("#toc-sidebar a").addClass("link-secondary");

    // Make the share button work:
    // Use the web Share API where it is supported, on mobile devices,
    // where it hopefully allows the user to pick any suitable app they
    // have installed to share.
    let isTouchScreen = "ontouchstart" in document.documentElement;
    let useNativeShare = isTouchScreen && navigator.share;
    let shared_title = "pandoc_writing_tools Feature Demo";
    let shared_url = "https://pandoc_writing_tools.github.io/pandoc_writing_tools";
    if (useNativeShare) {
      let share_button = jQuery('#share-button');
      share_button.click(function(){
        navigator.share({ title: shared_title, url: shared_url});
      });
      // Disable drop-down functionality of the share button.
      jQuery('#share-dropdown').removeClass('dropdown');
      share_button.removeClass('dropdown-toggle');
      share_button.removeAttr('data-bs-toggle');
      // and add tooltip to the button now that it's not a drop-down.
      share_button.attr("data-bs-placement", "bottom");
      share_button.attr("data-bs-toggle", "tooltip");
      share_button.attr("data-bs-title", "Share");
    };
    let twitter_params = { text: shared_title, url: shared_url,
                           hashtags: "pandoc_writing_tools" };
    jQuery("#twitter-share-link").attr("href",
      "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?" + jQuery.param(twitter_params));
    jQuery("#linkedin-share-link").attr("href",
      "https://www.linkedin.com/sharing/share-offsite/?"
      + jQuery.param({url: shared_url}));
    jQuery("#mastodon-share-link").attr("href",
      "https://tootpick.org/#"
      + jQuery.param({text: shared_title + ' ' + shared_url
                            + ' #pandoc_writing_tools'}));
    jQuery("#bluesky-share-link").attr("href",
      "https://bsky.app/intent/compose/?"
      + jQuery.param({text: shared_title + ' ' + shared_url
      + ' #pandoc_writing_tools'}));


    // Needed to enable the bootstrap tooltips:
    if (!isTouchScreen) {
      let tooltipTriggerList =
        document.querySelectorAll('[data-bs-toggle="tooltip"]');
      let tooltipList = [...tooltipTriggerList].map(
        tooltipTriggerEl => new bootstrap.Tooltip(tooltipTriggerEl,
                                                  {trigger : 'hover'}));
    }

    // Make sidenotes toggleable:
    jQuery('.sidenote_ref').click(function(){
      let sidenote_id = jQuery(this).attr("href");
      let sidenote = jQuery(sidenote_id);
      if (sidenote.css("display") == "none") {
        sidenote.css("display", "block");
      } else {
        sidenote.css("display", "none");
      }
    });
  });
</script>

</body>

</html>
